tasks.label: Remover duplicados clientes
args: const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3').verbose(); const db = new sqlite3.Database('database.db'); db.serialize(() => { db.all(`SELECT telefone, MIN(id) as keep_id FROM clientes WHERE telefone IS NOT NULL AND telefone != '' GROUP BY telefone HAVING COUNT(*) > 1`, [], (err, dups) => { if (err) { console.error(err); process.exit(1); } dups.forEach(dup => { db.run(`DELETE FROM clientes WHERE telefone = ? AND id != ?`, [dup.telefone, dup.keep_id]); }); db.close(); }); });
